Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Botto and Stephanie Dobozin for Wells Fargo Bank, Carol Casey and Paul Wattis Jr.

Mr. Botto stated that the term "settling" is a legal procedure followed by the Trustees acknowledging that notice has been given to all parties and that the parties are not here to object. Mr. Botto also stated that the Trustees are not asking the Court to approve attorneys fees or trustees fees and referred to Probate Code 17200 (b)(5). The Accounting Petitions were taken under submission.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chen.
